main(String[]) - Static method in class com.rays.ORSProject10Application

MarksheetCtl is the controller class for managing marksheet-related operations.

MarksheetDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Marksheet entity.

MarksheetDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Marksheet entity.

MarksheetDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for the Marksheet entity.

MarksheetForm - Class in com.rays.form
MarksheetForm is a form class used for capturing marksheet-related data.

marksheetMeritList(String, UserContext) - Method in class com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl
Executes a custom HQL query to get the merit list with top 10 records.
MarksheetServiceImpl - Class in com.rays.service
MarksheetServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Marksheet entity.

MarksheetServiceInt - Interface in com.rays.service
College Service interface.
MESSAGE - Static variable in class com.rays.common.ORSResponse
Constant key for response messages.
myProfile(MyProfileForm, BindingResult) - Method in class com.rays.ctl.UserCtl
Updates the profile information of the currently logged-in user.

MyProfileForm is a form class used for capturing user profile data.
